item.description:
Pinnacle @Pinnacle · 33min DO NOT Use Public Betting Percentages When Betting on Sports!
Here's why... youtube.com DO NOT Use Public Betting Percentages When Betting on Sports! Professional sports bettor Rob Pizzola from @TheHammerHQ explains why you need to stop using public betting percentages when betting on sports. Instead, you ... 3 721

item.title: RichCimini: Rich Cimini @RichCimini · 37min Jimmy Johnson on the #Jets: “If they use the picks wisely, this could give them a founda
item.description:
Rich Cimini @RichCimini · 37min Jimmy Johnson on the #Jets: “If they use the picks wisely, this could give them a foundation for years to come."
Johnson would know. Once upon a time, he parlayed the Herschel Walker trade into a franchise-altering haul.
My interview with Jimmy: De espn.com 5 4 38 11 mil

item.title: AroundTheNFL: Around The NFL @AroundTheNFL · 38min Cowboys QB Dak Prescott on what he expects for Dallas in 2026 NFL Draft: "I expect
item.description:
Around The NFL @AroundTheNFL · 38min Cowboys QB Dak Prescott on what he expects for Dallas in 2026 NFL Draft: "I expect two great draft picks. It will be something exciting. I don't know anything more than anybody else, if there's movement that will be cool. It's always an exciting night."
https:// nfl.com/news/cowboys-q b-dak-prescott-on-offseason-workouts-george-pickens-he-s-looked-great?campaign=Twitter_atn … 1 2 12 9 mil

item.title: Clevta: Clevta @Clevta · 1h Put together some data from Kiper, Jeremiah, Brugler and Schrager for their final mocks since 2022.
item.description: Clevta @Clevta · 1h Put together some data from Kiper, Jeremiah, Brugler and Schrager for their final mocks since 2022. Its a bit unfair bc Kiper seems to release his final mock earlier than the others. Nonetheless. Here is how each have fared overall, just picks 11-32 (tougher in general to hit) Mostrar más 9 2 45 8 mil

item.title:
GeorgeTsilfidis: George Tsilfidis @GeorgeTsilfidis · 1h End of an era. The most credible wrestler to ever step in the ring
No fanfare.
item.description:
George Tsilfidis @GeorgeTsilfidis · 1h End of an era. The most credible wrestler to ever step in the ring
No fanfare. No retirement tour. Just ride off into the sunset.
Will miss Brock Lesnar No se pudo reproducir el contenido multimedia. Recargar 7 401
